name: Chicken and Rice Stirfry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Skinless boneless chicken breast, cubed
3 tbsp soy sauce, low sodium, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 cups water and the contents of the chicken broth can in a pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Add rice to the pot and bring to a boil again. Then cover and reduce heat to simmer until the liquid is absorbed (approximately 30 minutes).
3. In a wok or large pan, heat half a cup of water, chicken bouillon powder, and garlic over medium-high heat.
4. Add the prepared vegetables and chicken. Stir-fry until the vegetables are tender and the chicken is cooked through (about 15 minutes).
5. Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir well.
6. Add soy sauce and mix everything together.
NOTES: Make sure all visible fat is removed from the chicken before cooking. The chicken bouillon used in this recipe is Knorr. Per Serving - Calories - 287.7, Total Fat - 2.2g, 6.9% CCF.
